summary: Iteration 139: Mira Chat Widget + Pillar Product CRUD testing complete. All 27 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Mira Chat Widget tested on Stay, Care, and Fit pages - all working correctly. The floating MakeMyTrip-style chat widget is visible, opens/closes properly, accepts messages, and shows AI responses.

TestMiraChatWidget.test_mira_chat_basic_message: PASS - Mira chat returns AI response
TestMiraChatWidget.test_mira_chat_with_pillar_context: PASS - Works for stay, care, fit, enjoy, learn, adopt pillars

TestServiceFlow.test_stay_booking_creates_ticket: PASS - Stay booking creates ticket and notification
TestServiceFlow.test_enjoy_rsvp_creates_ticket: PASS - Enjoy RSVP creates ticket, notification, and inbox entry

FrontendMiraChatWidget.stay_page_opens_on_click: PASS - Chat widget opens with welcome message
FrontendMiraChatWidget.stay_page_type_and_send: PASS - Can type message and send
FrontendMiraChatWidget.stay_page_quick_prompts: PASS - Quick prompts visible and contextual
FrontendMiraChatWidget.stay_page_close: PASS - Can close widget, button reappears

action_items: Consider adding product endpoints for remaining pillars: Celebrate, Dine, Travel, Paperwork, Advisory, Emergency, Farewell, Shop (currently return 404)
critical_code_review_comments: Mira Chat Widget implementation is clean and follows MakeMyTrip-style floating design
All 6 main pillars (Stay, Fit, Care, Enjoy, Learn, Adopt) have working seed-products and GET products endpoints
8 additional pillars (Celebrate, Dine, Travel, Paperwork, Advisory, Emergency, Farewell, Shop) do not have product endpoints yet
Service flow (Intent → Notification → Ticket → Inbox) is working correctly for Stay bookings and Enjoy RSVPs

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Mira widget working on Stay, Fit, Care pages)

seed_data_creation: Test bookings and RSVPs created with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira Chat Widget is working on all pillar pages (Stay, Care, Fit tested). The widget uses data-testid='mira-widget-button' for the floating button and data-testid='mira-chat-widget' for the opened chat. All 6 main pillars have working product CRUD endpoints. Service flow creates tickets and notifications correctly.
